revision.comment: Sync from repo need_translation/ [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24615006798|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:大三王子神社]] {{Expand Japanese|大三王子神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Daisan Ōji Shrine | native_name = 大三王子神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Daisan Ōji Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.36404|139.245089}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Daisan Ōji Shrine'''|大三王子神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181576 * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181576 ** Series ordinal: 1035 * {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|ko|정5위|zh|正五位|qid=Q11123280}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181576 * {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank|ja|正六位|ko|정6위|zh|正六位|qid=Q11545372}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181576 * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181576 == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|ja|伊豆国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11380552}} ** Series ordinal: 8 ** P155: {{ill|Azusawakenomikoto Shrine|lt=Azusawakenomikoto Shrine|ja|阿豆佐和気命神社|qid=Q134926700}} ** P156: {{ill|Monoiminano- Shrine|lt=Monoiminano- Shrine|qid=Q135039640}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Izu Province|lt=Izu Province|ar|مقاطعة إزو|be|Ідзу (правінцыя)|ckb|پارێزگای ئیزو|cs|Provincie Izu|cv|Идзу|de|Provinz Izu|en|Izu Province|es|Provincia de Izu|fa|ولایت ایزو|fr|Province d'Izu|gl|Provincia de Izu|hak|Yî-theu-koet|id|Provinsi Izu|it|Izu (provincia)|ja|伊豆国|ko|이즈국|lt|Idzu žemė|nl|Izu (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Izu|pt|Província de Izu|ru|Идзу (провинция)|simple|Izu Province|sk|Izu (provincia)|sr|Провинција Изу|th|แคว้นอิซุ|tr|Izu (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ідзу|zh_min_nan|Izu-kok|zh_yue|伊豆國|zh|伊豆國|qid=Q860928}} * {{ill|Kamo District, Shizuoka|lt=Kamo district|ar|مقاطعة كامو (شيزوكا)|ceb|Kamo-gun (distrito sa Hapon, Shizuoka-ken)|en|Kamo District, Shizuoka|fa|ناحیه کامو، شیزوئوکا|fr|District de Kamo (Shizuoka)|id|Distrik Kamo, Shizuoka|it|Distretto di Kamo (Shizuoka)|ja|賀茂郡|ko|가모군 (시즈오카현)|nl|District Kamo (Shizuoka)|pl|Powiat Kamo (Shizuoka)|ru|Камо (Сидзуока)|uk|Повіт Камо (Сідзуока)|zh|賀茂郡|qid=Q961511}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.36404|139.245089}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181576 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181576 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Takemikakano- Shrine|lt=Takemikakano- Shrine|qid=Q135039639}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181576 ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}} ==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[JA:大三王子神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930667}} [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大三王子神社|version=102258934|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Need translation]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 大三王子神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=東京都島嶼部}} |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}大三山1-1 |位置 = {{Coord|34|21|51.5|N|139|14|40.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 大三王子明神、弟三王子明神 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月5日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大三王子
神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|21|51.5|N|139|14|40.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|21|51.5|N|139|14|40.5|E}}}} }} '''大三王子神社'''（だいさんおうじじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}（{{jalink|新島|Q1191108}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''多祁美加々命神社'''（たけみかかのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131349/ 大三王子神社] - 八百万の神。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 {{jalink|2019年|Q25274}}（{{jalink|令和|Q62609017}}元年）の{{jalink|令和元年東日本台風|Q69841946|台風被害}}で社殿が破壊され、現在は社殿が撤去された更地の状態となっている（2024年現在）[https://niijima-info.jp/enjoy/attractions/daisansama/ 大三王子神社] - 新島村観光案内所。 == 祭神 == * 大三王子明神（だいさんおうじみょうじん） - {{jalink|事代主神}}の王子・多祁美加々命（たけみかかのみこと）のこと。 * 弟三王子明神（でいさんおうじみょうじん） - その弟。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://niijima-info.jp/enjoy/attractions/daisansama/ 大三王子神社] - 新島村観光案内所 ==End Japanese== [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 200+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Need translation]]
